mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_resume_favorite (user_id, resume_id, fitted_position) VALUES (#{userId}, #{resumeId}, #{fittedPosition})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_resume_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND resume_id = #{resumeId}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT f.fitted_position FROM user_resume_favorite f INNER JOIN resume r ON f.resume_id = r.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.fitted_position IS NOT NULL AND f.fitted_position != ''
